_comment: PM2 log rotation config — install with: pm2 install pm2-logrotate && pm2 set pm2-logrotate:max_size 10M && pm2 set pm2-logrotate:retain 7 && pm2 set pm2-logrotate:compress true && pm2 set pm2-logrotate:dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD_HH-mm-ss && pm2 set pm2-logrotate:rotateModule true && pm2 set pm2-logrotate:workerInterval 30
